nodes.label: Web Deployment
nodes.rationale: Omits spec.replicas only when the HPA actually renders (matches web-hpa gate) to avoid a Deployment with no owner; uses preStop sleep so the LB observes NotReady before SIGTERM reaches uvicorn; honors terminationGracePeriodSeconds so long-lived signaling WebSockets drain in-flight calls during rolling updates; checksum/config annotation rolls pods when the ConfigMap changes since envFrom is only read at pod startup.

hyperedges.label: Helm web tier autoscaling and routing
